questionHtml: Write the equation for the reaction of Ca(OH)2 (aq) with hydrochloric acid, HCl (aq).

meta.title: Write the equation for the reaction of Ca(OH)2 (aq) with hydrochloric acid, HCl (aq).
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.1—How much? The amount of chemical change
Reactivity 2.1.1—Chemical equations show the ratio of reactants and products in a reaction. Deduce chemical equations when reactants and products are specified.
